ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "ord_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "stor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the store that placed the order */,
  "ord_num" TEXT /* Order number assigned to the order */,
  "ord_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "payterms" TEXT /* Payment terms associated with the order */,
  "title_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the product being ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., online, in-store, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ord_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("title_id") REFERENCES inventory ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_stor_id FOREIGN KEY ("stor_id") REFERENCES stores ("stor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "stor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "stor_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "title_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the product */,
  "title_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "stock_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier */,
  "account_manager" TEXT /* Name or contact information of the account manager */,
  "payment_terms_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the payment terms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "ord_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being paid */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the payment transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ord_id FOREIGN KEY ("ord_id") REFERENCES orders ("ord_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status update */,
  "ord_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order whose status is being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID or name of the person who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_ord_id FOREIGN KEY ("ord_id") REFERENCES orders ("ord_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the shipping record */,
  "ord_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "method" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_ord_id FOREIGN KEY ("ord_id") REFERENCES orders ("ord_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the return record */,
  "ord_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the return was initiated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_reason_code" TEXT /* Standardized code for the reason of return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_ord_id FOREIGN KEY ("ord_id") REFERENCES orders ("ord_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "ord_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order affected by the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was logged */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_ord_id FOREIGN KEY ("ord_id") REFERENCES orders ("ord_id")
)
